Video.summary: Kaliegh is 23 and is a heroin addict. Her mother, best friend and ex-boyfriend who got her hooked on heroin in the first place, are here to beg her to go to rehab. Follow her as she travels to the rehab clinic and tries to get clean!
Video.title: My Daughter Prostitutes for Heroin

Video.summary: Martin won't let his son to marry his boyfriend. April wants her ex back but he wants another man!
Video.title: Mom Stole My Lady Love!

Video.summary: Tia says she has proof that her brother-in-law cheats on her sister; Maranda wants to get back together with her ex-fiance but believes it could stir up problems with her best friend; Kaila wants a threesome.
Video.title: Man Snatching Sister

Video.summary: Mr. Panama is back and still cannot decide which girl he wants to be with. Next Chauntey is a transsexual who’s cheating with her lover's brother! Later Chris is back and he's still trying to play Dee and Rhonda at the same time.
Video.title: Unforgettable Guests Return

Video.summary: A woman thinks her friend is sleeping with someone she is also dating; a man wants his girlfriend back after she leaves; a woman tries to save her friend from what she thinks is a bad relationship.
Video.title: Boyfriend Stealing Bestie

Video.summary: Paige disapproves of her sister's boyfriend and devises a plan to get her to leave him; another woman may foil Derek's plans to make his girlfriend a permanent part of his life; Tony wants his cousin's girlfriend.
Video.title: I Was Set Up!

Video.summary: Jenny’s a 20-year-old illiterate prostitute who’s 9 months pregnant and refuses to stop working. Her mom, a former prostitute and drug addict, needs Steve’s help. Then, Rick asks Steve to convince his daughter Jennifer to stop using!
Video.title: Steve Saves a Pregnant Prostitute / A Father’s Nightmare

Image.alt: Steve Saves a Pregnant Prostitute / A Father’s Nightmare
Steve Saves a Pregnant Prostitute / A Father’s Nightmare
Steve Saves a Pregnant Prostitute / A Father’s Nightmare

Video.summary: Darryl has been cheating on his girlfriend Nicole with her hair dresser Nickell. He says he was just getting bored of the same old thing. Then Cheree is here because her girlfriend Chocolate is having a hard time coming out lo her family.
Video.title: Break-ups and Beatdowns

Video.summary: Zack and Cheyenne have differing hopes for their future; Nee Nee confronts the friend she thinks is trying to sabotage her relationship with her boyfriend; Stormi confesses to sleeping with her friend's man.
Video.title: Driven to Cheat

Video.summary: Tony confesses to his girlfriend that he is cheating on her with a transsexual. Mary confronts her transsexual roommate Shortee. Next, Limont confronts his one-night stand.
Video.title: Tales of the She-Males

Video.summary: Jennison is here to break up Scooter's marriage. Next Jana thinks her boyfriend is cheating, so she invited our cameras to join her when she confronted him at his home. A search of his house revealed another woman in the closet Jana's twin sister!
Video.title: Cheating Lovers Confess!

Video.summary: A woman sleeps with her brother; a woman leaves her controlling husband; a woman sleeps with her husband's sister; a man impregnates his mistress.
Video.title: My Brother Is My Lover

Video.summary: Alley and Jessica have a threesome with Nneka’s man Matt. Now Nneka’s here to get her revenge. Then, Jordan reveals to his girlfriend Cassandra that he may not be all the man she thinks he is. Plus more stories of relationships gone wild.
Video.title: Threesomes With My Sister

Video.summary: Things were going great with his new girlfriend until Roger found himself in bed with her friend; Kandy's boyfriend reveals a secret that could change her generous ways; Dannisha's boyfriend continues to beg for a threesome.
Video.title: Down for a Threesome?

Video.summary: A man impregnates his girlfriend's cousin.
Video.title: Steve & A Pregnant Girl

Video.summary: Mary Jane has a secret to reveal to George. For the past 6 months, she''s been cheating on him with a woman! Then, Tanya reveals to her husband that she’s in love with Sheri!
Video.title: Surprise I Have A Bi-sexual Lover

Image.alt: Surprise I Have A Bi-sexual Lover
Surprise I Have A Bi-sexual Lover
Surprise I Have A Bi-sexual Lover

Video.summary: Alex, who left his girlfriend while she was pregnant, wants her back; Ciarra faces Trice's wrath for sleeping with her boyfriend.
Video.title: Halloween: I'm Sorry Boo

Video.summary: Whitney learns what really happens during her children's father's late-night sessions at the recording studio; new mom Coralena is engaged in a war between her fiance and her friend; Denzel's girlfriends fight over him.
Video.title: Big Booty Mistakes

Video.summary: Gloria thinks her sister's apparent drug-overdose death was not an accident, and that her other sister may be responsible.
Video.title: Did You Party With Our Sister and Leave Her to Die?

Image.alt: Did You Party With Our Sister and Leave Her to Die?
Did You Party With Our Sister and Leave Her to Die?
Did You Party With Our Sister and Leave Her to Die?

Video.summary: Samantha believes that her 3 year old daughter was molested by her ex-boyfriend's brother, Chad. Chad denies sexually abusing the child and even took a voice stress test to prove his innocence. Now he wants to clear his name.
Video.title: We Tested You Six Times

Video.summary: Russell wants to put his family back together after his 3 children died in a fire. Next, Tatiana believes her 2-year old nephew was abused. And she's accusing her sister's ex-fiance Chris. Chris says he's not an abuser.
Video.title: Did You Leave My Kids to Die?

Image.alt: Did You Leave My Kids to Die?
Did You Leave My Kids to Die?
Did You Leave My Kids to Die?

Video.summary: Dorothy is 17 years old and has felt so uncomfortable living at home with her mom and stepdad, that she has resorted to selling her body to take care of herself. Then, Connie says her ex pressured her to get pregnant at 16 and then refused to help her support their child.
Video.title: Teen Girls In Trouble

Video.summary: Emotions are high in this intense story about a young girl allegedly being stalked by her molester. But when the results are read, the truth is not what it seemed.
Video.title: You Better Hope You Passed

Video.summary: Updates on Justin, who said his girlfriend flirted with other men in front of him and acted provocatively whenever another man was around, and Adonis, who admitted he was living a double life with two women in the same home.
Video.title: Updates: Memorable Guests

Video.summary: Angel claims that her father Ronald abused her sexually, forced her to do drugs and even got her addicted to crack when she was 18. His other daughter Tracy also claims he’s tried to abuse her several times, but Ronald says he’s innocent!
Video.title: Devil Dad

Video.summary: Michael and Flora are no longer dating, but they have a 3 year old daughter together. Michael thinks that Flora’s boyfriend Dwayne is abusing his daughter, but is he telling the truth? Watch Steve get to the bottom of this!
Video.title: 3 Year Old Locked in the Basement

Image.alt: 3 Year Old Locked in the Basement
3 Year Old Locked in the Basement
3 Year Old Locked in the Basement

Video.summary: Loretta and Joseph have been together for 2 years and have a young son together. She says that when she was pregnant, he punched and pulled her hair. She claims that she’s been faithful but Joseph isn’t convinced. Who’s telling the truth?
Video.title: Abuse, Prostitution, DNA...And A Retest

Video.summary: Brandi and Marty have been together 5 years. Brandi's brother and her mother claim that Marty is being physically abusive and has been cheating. Plus, Jessica worries that Derwin is now cheating on her and claims that he's been abusive towards her.
Video.title: Steve, I'm Not An Abuser

Video.summary: A year ago, Jessica confessed to violently shaking her infant son and causing him severe brain injuries. But now Jessica has recanted and claims that a sippy cup caused his injuries. Be sure to tune in to hear the truth!
Video.title: If You Didn't Shake Your Son, Why Did You Confess?

Image.alt: If You Didn't Shake Your Son, Why Did You Confess?
If You Didn't Shake Your Son, Why Did You Confess?
If You Didn't Shake Your Son, Why Did You Confess?

Video.summary: Theresa and Darron were arrested for child endangerment after their toddler daughter was spotted begging for food and now face sexual abuse accusations. Then, Megan believes her fiancé Mark physically abused her baby, and possibly broke his leg!
Video.title: We Lost Our Kids, But We're Good Parents

Image.alt: We Lost Our Kids, But We're Good Parents
We Lost Our Kids, But We're Good Parents
We Lost Our Kids, But We're Good Parents

Video.summary: Misguided youth ... 15-year-old Gala is having some serious and dangerous issues with race and her mother Tanya believes she needs to change. Her out of control behavior has her sneaking out of the house, sleeping around with older men, and skipping school. Gala argues this is the way she was raised, but her mother blames Gala's boyfriend Patrick. With her behavior escalating, Steve's trying everything he can for one last attempt to open her mind.
Video.title: My Teen Would Kill For the Klan

Image.alt: My Teen Would Kill For the Klan
My Teen Would Kill For the Klan
My Teen Would Kill For the Klan

Video.summary: 14 year old Rusty called our show because he says that he can no longer deal with his parent's constant fighting. He says that in the past they've hit each other, thrown appliances at each other and even bit him. His mother Mildred says that she and her husband Russell always fight and abuse each other because she suspects Russell of cheating.
Video.title: Steve I'm 14, I Need Your Help

Image.alt: Steve I'm 14, I Need Your Help
Steve I'm 14, I Need Your Help
Steve I'm 14, I Need Your Help

Video.summary: There is nothing more serious than allegations of child abuse, but when all the testimonies are laid out, the stories just don't add up. Steve has the lie detector results and will reveal the truth once and for all.
Video.title: I Don't Believe Your Story
